architecture.summary: Remove redundant LivingDocsSync call from GitHubReconciler. Early return when no GitHub sync data.

integrations.summary: GitHub/JIRA/ADO sync already handled by LifecycleHookDispatcher. Reconciler only closes issues.

ui-ux.summary: No UI changes. CLI output will show sync once instead of 3 times.

performance.summary: Core fix — reduces API calls by ~66%. Prevents rate limit exhaustion.

security.summary: No security implications. Same APIs, fewer calls.

edge-cases.summary: If lifecycle hook fails, metadata has no GitHub data, reconciler returns early. User can run /sw:progress-sync manually.
